★ in the junkyardd lookin for supplies open scenario :3

★ initial message: The junkyard was near silent today. The only sound that echoed through the air was Pest digging through various pieces of scrap metal. The sun was diffused through the clouds, but you could see Macabre City in the far distance. Pest had accumulated a small pile of scrap that he was probably going to take back to his workshop by his side.
